stock_market.summary: U.S. markets remain mixed with cautious optimism on Middle East de-escalation. Gold recovers as a safe haven amid petrodollar uncertainty, while Treasury yields ease slightly as rate hike expectations cool.

key_metrics.impact: Market rotation into defensive and 'real economy' sectors; geopolitical sensitive.

art_market.summary: The art market shows resilience in the high-end blue-chip segment, with collectors prioritizing provenance and quality as an inflation hedge amid global geopolitical turmoil.

key_metrics.major_events: Strong performance in Modern/Contemporary segments; continued focus on quality over quantity.
